titleStmt.title: SII 39.30: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 30. (A.R. No. 30 of 1916.) SAṈṈAVAṈAM, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SĀLYAVANĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH AND EAST WALL OF SAME MAṆḌAPA. MĀṞAVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN-KULAŚĒKHARADĒVA, WHO WAS PLEASED TO TAKE ALL COUNTRIES, 38th YEAR (= 1296 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription records the gift of land by the ūrārs of Viyādaraiyaṉkōṭṭai for making offerings to the image of Tiruvādavūr-Nāyaṇār set up in the same temple by a certain Sundara Pāṇḍya-Bhaṭṭaṉ. Signatories like Sūraṉ-chinnan, Kanakk-Kālingataraiyaṉ etc are mentioned in this fragmentary inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmakkittikku meṟ śrī komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭala muṅkoṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulacekara tevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 8 vatu Ai(p)paci śrī tiruttiyū(r) mu(ṭ)ṭattu tiruccaṉṉavaṉattu Uṭaiyā(r) tiruccaṉṉavaṉamuṭaiya nāyiṉār koyilil tevakaṉmi cikāriyañcevār śrī māheśvara kaṇkāṇi cevārkaḷukku I(n)nāṭu viyā taraiyaṉ koṭṭai ḻaiñcca Ū(ra)varom piṭipāṭu paṇṇi kuṭuttaparicāvatu I(n)ta nāyiṉār koyilil muppatu vaṭṭattu civappirāmaṇaril ceya
yāṉ Imametaruvāṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya paṭṭaṉ Innāyaṉār koyilil Ēṟiaruḷa ppaṇṇiṉa tiruvātavūr nāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi (u) ḷḷiṭṭa ṉitta nimanta tukku vakaḷ viṭ(ṭa nila)māvatu viyataraiyaṉ koṭṭai vayalil periya kuḷatil veḷḷuruva maṭaiyāl nirpāyum E kaḷ kāṇi (ci)la viṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu patu kiḻpāṟkellai naṭuvillempak kuḷattil nānā(ḷu)kku meṟkum teṉ ṟkellai paṟaiyaṉ kāṇi
tevaṉ kāḷaiyār Uḻutu potukiṟa taṭi Iraṇṭum mututaricāṉa taṭi Iraṇṭukkum vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai muṉpu tiruvilaikuppuṟamāka viṭṭa tevatāṉapaṟṟil vā ttuṭaval varampukku kiḻakkum pa tevatāṉam Ālāla cuntaraṉ vaykkal kiḻ rampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟk kellai It tāṉam vaṭavarampuvanta cevuṟaikkut teṟkkum Āka (ic)ainta perunāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa palataṭiyāl Ēṟṟac curukkam Uṭpaṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Innāyaṉāṟkku kārāḻvai
kavum Inta cuntarāpāṇṭiya paṭṭaṇukku kāṇi Āvatu Ākavum Innāyaṉāṟku Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa viñcaṉattukkum Iṟaiyili kārāḻmai Āka nirvārttu Eṅkaḷur puravil kaḻittu viṭṭamai(kku) cantirāticcavaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kuṭuttom tiruvātavūr nāyiṉārku viyātaraiyaṉ koṭṭai Ūrkku camainta Ūravarom Ippaṭikku Añcāta kaṇṭapparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku muṭitāṅki rāmaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.30 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
